The task specifies exact configuration values for a Moodle LMS site: full name 'Springfield Technical College LMS', short name 'STC Moodle', summary starting with 'Welcome to the official learning platform for Springfield Technical College', and a custom menu structure with a Library link (http://library.example.edu), a Student Services parent item, and two nested sub-items (Help Desk at http://help.example.edu and Calendar at http://calendar.example.edu).
